description: Add git mutex, pull-before-execute, push-with-retry, rebase conflict handling, and TUI git log lines to executor.rs

userStories.description: In executor.rs, create a shared tokio::sync::Mutex (e.g. `Arc<tokio::sync::Mutex<()>>`) called `git_mutex` in `run_executor`. Pass it into `execute_story` and wrap all git operations (commit, pull, push) in a lock guard so only one story at a time can perform git operations. This prevents conflicts when parallel stories finish simultaneously. The mutex should be created once in run_executor and passed via Arc clone to each spawned story task.
userStories.title: Add git mutex for serialized git operations

userStories.description: In executor.rs, before each story starts running claude (inside execute_story, before `run_claude_for_story`), acquire the git_mutex and run `git pull --rebase origin <branch>` where <branch> is the current branch (get it via `git branch --show-current`). Log '[git] pulling latest...' via StoryLog event. If the pull succeeds, log '[git] pull ok' and release the mutex. If the pull fails due to rebase conflicts, run `git rebase --abort`, log '[git] conflict detected on pull, skipping', send a StoryError event, and return Err to skip the story. The pull should happen inside the git_mutex lock.
userStories.title: Add git pull --rebase before story execution

userStories.description: In executor.rs, replace the existing `auto_push` function with a new `git_push_with_retry` function that: 1) Acquires the git_mutex. 2) Logs '[git] pushing...' via StoryLog. 3) Attempts `git push origin <branch>`. 4) If push fails (likely due to remote changes), logs '[git] push failed, pulling and retrying...', runs `git pull --rebase origin <branch>`. If rebase conflicts, runs `git rebase --abort`, logs '[git] conflict detected, skipping', and returns Err. 5) Retries push up to 3 times total. 6) On success, logs '[git] push ok'. 7) On final failure after 3 attempts, logs '[git] push failed after 3 attempts'. Update execute_story to call this new function instead of auto_push. The function should accept the git_mutex, cwd, story_id, and tx sender.
userStories.title: Replace auto_push with push-with-retry logic

userStories.description: Run a full `cargo build` to ensure everything compiles cleanly with no warnings related to the new git coordination code. Review all '[git] ...' log lines in executor.rs to ensure consistent formatting: '[git] pulling latest...', '[git] pull ok', '[git] pushing...', '[git] push ok', '[git] push failed, pulling and retrying...', '[git] conflict detected, skipping'. Fix any compilation errors or inconsistencies found.
userStories.title: Verify full build and test git log output format
